overview: A modern, dark-mode professional portfolio for UI/UX Designer Kalaimathi R. Features animated hero, bento project grid, glassmorphism cards, and smooth scroll animations with an electric blue/purple/cyan accent palette on a deep charcoal background.
features: Animated hero with grid background, gradient glow, and floating UI elements
Bento grid project showcase with hover animations and case study buttons
Glassmorphism skills cards for design, tools, and technical skills
Responsive contact section with email, LinkedIn, and phone links
Premium dark-mode typography with strong visual hierarchy
